'''Silky''' was a [[Quarf]] that lived on the forest [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. He befriended the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa]] so that he could eventually kidnap her for his mistress, [[Jadru]], who planned to ransom the princess for the Ewoks' [[Sunstar/Legends|Sunstar]]. When in his fake form, he had a beautiful unicorn-like appearance; but his true form was a fearsome monster that had long sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], large black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and green scaly skin. Silky also had a pair of small wings to either fly or to hold his captured victims, as he did with Kneesaa.<ref name="Ewok">{{Ewoks|Baga's Rival}}</ref>
